nasb.text: Elijah took the child and brought him down from the upper room into the house and gave him to his mother; and Elijah said, “See, your son is alive.”

esv.text: And Elijah took the child and brought him down from the upper chamber into the house and delivered him to his mother. And Elijah said, “See, your son lives.”

cnv.text: 以利亞把孩子抱起來，從樓上下到屋子裡去，把孩子交給他的母親；以利亞說：“看，你的兒子活了！”

ccb.text: 以利亚将孩子从楼上抱下来，交给他母亲，说：“看，你儿子活过来了！”
